creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #9)
> web site does not have contents

You are mistaken. The source has always been available. With the exception
of ~9hrs. during an unplanned server upgrade.
Please find log of session below.

--Chris


Script started on Wed Oct 15 01:41:33 2014

# mkdir ./test

# svn co --depth empty svn://svn.freebsd.org/ports/head test

Checked out revision 370895.

# svn up --set-depth empty test/net
